name: rox-mesh-relay-watcher
description: Mesh relay-watcher (D5): subscribes to the Nostr relay pool, unwraps NIP-17 gift-wrapped DMs addressed to rox device keys, and relays each as a signed POST to /api/mesh/inbound. STANDALONE — not part of the Rox bun/turbo workspace; the live deploy + real Nostr subscription are DEFERRED. This package is a CONTRACT STUB only (no live relay connections, no key signing). DO NOT auto-deploy.
